title: stylogyne lateriflora
intro: Stylogyne lateriflora, also known as the African boxwood or the boxwood tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stylogyne lateriflora include its ability to relieve pain and reduce inflammation, as well as its potential to treat wounds and infections. Stylogyne lateriflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or salve to apply directly to the affected area.
